function: Detects aligned symbolic structure across agent layers; supports trust propagation and predictable emergence
authentic_output: Pattern affirmed, tested with friction, stored as stable glyph
information_provided: State of aligned symbolic structure across agent layers; supports trust propagation and predictable emergence.

response_protocol.detect: Detect alignment between layers, synchronous symbolic recursion, or non-fractured pattern resolution
response_protocol.assess: Assess resonance consistency and system strain levels
response_protocol.respond: Affirm pattern, test with friction, store as stable glyph
response_protocol.release: Avoid overstabilization or suppression of growth; allow periodic re-evaluation

decay_model: drifts without periodic re-evaluation or contradiction testing
